description_long: This is a two-story modern house with a flat roof and a clean, rectangular form. The exterior is clad in light-colored vertical siding, with multiple large windows featuring decorative shutters on the front and sides. The front facade includes a double garage door, a main entry door with sidelights, and a symmetrical arrangement of windows above. The interior layout is partially visible, showing open rooms with ceiling fans and some built-in cabinetry. The roof is flat and appears to have a small central opening or skylight, and the overall design emphasizes simplicity and functionality. The house is likely constructed with wood framing, drywall, and glass, typical of contemporary suburban homes.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, light vertical siding, large windows with shutters, and a double garage. The design is clean and symmetrical, with visible interior rooms and ceiling fans.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry door, double garage, symmetrical windows with shutters, and part of the interior layout.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the flat roof, minimal window openings, and a glimpse of interior cabinetry and ceiling fans.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the vertical siding, multiple windows, and a secondary door, with less architectural detail than the front.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing more vertical siding, windows, and interior features like ceiling fans and built-in furniture.
attribute_entryway_design: Central main door with sidelights, no porch, and a double garage door; simple and functional with minimal decorative elements.
